name: Banano Vibe Monitor
description: Two-layer vibe moderation for Discord: local sentiment gate + AI review. Monitors watched channels, redirects bad vibes, escalates to mods.

watchedChannelIds.description: Discord channel IDs to monitor for vibes

modChannelId.description: Discord channel ID for mod escalations

modRoleIds.description: Discord role IDs allowed to use !banano stop/start (empty = check Discord permissions)

modUserIds.description: Discord user IDs always allowed to use mod commands

maxRecentMessages.description: Number of recent messages for AI context (default: 10)

cooldownMs.description: Cooldown per channel between vibe actions in ms (default: 30000)

dedupeWindowMs.description: Window for message deduplication in ms (default: 60000)
